title: Ruby Kyser
compiled_truth: Ruby Kyser is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-09 to 2001-12-06), Ruby Kyser sent 5 and received 63 emails, totalling 68 interactions.
